personal.preferred_title: Senior AWS Data Engineer | Redshift, Glue, S3 & ETL

summary: Senior AWS Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building secure, scalable data pipelines, data warehouse workflows, telemetry platforms, and operational reporting systems. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, Athena, ETL/ELT, data quality, data modeling, security-minded delivery, and production troubleshooting. Experienced supporting regulated enterprise environments with reliable documentation, observability, stakeholder communication, and automation of repetitive data management tasks.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue for ETL, Athena-style lake access patterns, and Redshift for analytics and ML forecasting workloads.
Designed historical schemas, reporting datasets, and data warehouse structures to support capacity analysis, seasonal forecasting, retention, and executive reporting.
Implemented data cleansing, validation, reconciliation, and troubleshooting routines to improve reliability of recurring pipeline outputs and analytics datasets.
Optimized SQL queries, storage structures, and pipeline workflows for performance, maintainability, and production operational use.
Containerized Python ETL pipeline jobs on EC2/ECS to support repeatable and scalable processing for capacity forecasting and telemetry analysis.
Developed dashboards and reporting workflows using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, and enterprise monitoring data to surface capacity risks and operational insights.
Supported governance and security expectations in a regulated banking environment, including access awareness, data quality controls, documentation, and production support discipline.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting production visibility and performance troubleshooting.
Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, production visibility, and support requirements.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and operational reports used by application and infrastructure teams.
Created technical documentation, repeatable procedures, and client training materials for monitoring onboarding and production operations.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap usage, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release gate decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting very high transaction volume.
Built validation tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to protect integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Produced technical documentation and maintained disciplined delivery practices for regulated system development.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Maintained billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, reporting, and support modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.AWS Data Engineering: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Data Lake Patterns, Serverless Data Platform Design, Cloud Data Pipelines
skills.Data Warehouse & ETL: ETL/ELT, Data Warehousing, Data Modeling, Data Ingestion, Data Cleansing, Data Standardization, Data Quality, Data Validation, Data Integration, Reporting Datasets
skills.Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, C++, Java
skills.Databases: Redshift, Oracle, Oracle RAC, PostgreSQL, MySQL, DB2, NoSQL Concepts, DynamoDB Concepts, RDS Concepts
skills.Monitoring & Observability: CloudWatch Concepts, Dynatrace AppMon, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics, Synthetic Monitoring, Alerts, Dashboards, Production Troubleshooting
skills.Security & Governance: Data Governance, Access Controls, Encryption Concepts, Compliance-Aware Delivery, Regulated Banking Environments, Documentation, Data Definitions
skills.DevOps & Delivery: Docker, Git, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Linux/Unix, Production Support, Code Review, Technical Documentation, Agile Collaboration
skills.Analytics & BI: QuickSight Concepts, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Executive Reporting, Operational Analytics, Capacity Forecasting
skills.Adjacent / Learning: Terraform fundamentals, Azure DevOps concepts, Event Driven Architecture concepts, ServiceNow user-level incident/change workflow exposure, HIPAA/PHI/PII awareness

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet/Snappy storage layouts, and AI-enabled access patterns for enterprise-scale analytics.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting engine using Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to reduce manual forecasting cycles by 90% and predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, resume tailoring, cover generation, quality gates, and application tracking using FAISS, sentence-transformers, and Grok API.
